articles.title: Nandani, Charani called up for England Test; Renuka, Bhatia back
articles.description: Amanjot Kaur and Kashvee Gautam, both recovering from injuries, missed out

articles.title: Saikia: BCCI to take action against IPL teams violating norms
articles.description: The BCCI secretary said teams have to "maintain some decorum so that the image of the IPL is never adversely affected"

articles.title: Yastika, Nandani, Radha picked for Women's T20 World Cup
articles.description: Amanjot Kaur is not available after she also missed the recent South Africa series with an injury

articles.title: Athapaththu's all-round heroics carries SL to 3-0 sweep of Bangladesh
articles.description: Hosts fell three short as rain-reduced game in Sylhet ended in thrilling finish

articles.title: Bangladesh eye rare double-series win over New Zealand in rainy Dhaka
articles.description: The weather could have a big, even a decisive, say in the third T20I but if there is play, Bangladesh would fancy their chances against an under-strength New Zealand

articles.title: Sangakkara and Mahanama part of Transformation Committee to run SLC
articles.description: The majority of the committee's members hail from corporate, legal, and political spheres, with former Member of Parliament Eran Wickramaratne appointed as chair

articles.title: Two SL U-19 cricketers arrested for allegedly filming women in a hotel
articles.description: Having been produced at the Aluthkade Magistrate's Court for their initial hearing, the players are next due back in court on May 25

articles.title: Shakib on Bangladesh's T20 World Cup pull-out: 'A blunder from the government side'
articles.description: "It was a great miss as far as Bangladesh cricket is concerned"

articles.title: SLC president Shammi Silva, executive committee members resign
articles.description: The Sri Lankan government is now likely to appoint an interim committee, which is expected to have former cricketers Sidath Wettimuny and Roshan Mahanama in it

articles.title: Former quick Geoff Allott named New Zealand Cricket chief executive
articles.description: Allott played 10 Tests and 31 ODIs for New Zealand but has also served as NZC's general manager of cricket and an NZC board director, taking over after the resignation of Scott Weenink

articles.title: Teen sensation Ira Jadhav becomes costliest buy at first-ever T20 Mumbai Women’s League auction
articles.description: Aakash Tigers secure 16-year-old Ira for INR10 lakh, with Sanika, Simran and Vrushali among the key picks.

articles.title: Women's T20 World Cup 2026: Harmanpreet Kaur leads India squad as Shreyanka Patil, Bharti Fulmali earn spots
articles.description: The same squad will also be featuring for the three-match T20I series against England ahead of the marquee tournament.

articles.title: Aspiring female cricketer commits suicide in Puducherry over non-selection in team
articles.description: The young woman was reportedly dejected after not being able to clear the selection trials for the T20 Team.
